'''Morv'vyal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] tech with the [[Drev'starn]] [[Drev'starn Department of Criminal Discouragement|Department of Criminal Discouragement]] taking fingerprints and other clues in the break-in of the [[Exoticalia Pet Emporium]]. When the others of his team smelled smoke, they suspect there was a fire in the building. When they accidentally found the [[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance]] agent's weapon [[Xerrol Corporation/Legends|Xerrol]] [[Nightstinger sporting blaster rifle|Nightstinger]] hidden behind a false wall, Vengeance killed them.<ref name="Vision of the Future" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
